metadata.v2_note: V2 indicators appear in PATHS_FIRST/PATHS_SECOND roadmaps under commercial IDs (#2638 epic, #2657-2662); legacy 64-879 range has no explicit V2 tags except governance 'phase 2' template packs.
metadata.coverage_note: Only 8 of 59 FUTURE_FEATURE files reference legacy issue IDs 64-879. Canvas (#1330+), Dashboard (#1624+), Paths (#2240+, #2633+) use commercial issue numbers outside this range.
